replies.msg:
有,

United Kingdom: TfL Rail (Elizabeth Line), South Western Railway

Sweden: Stockholm Metro, MTR Express, Stockholm commuter rail (Stockholms pendeltåg)

Australia: Melbourne's Metropolitan Rail Service, Sydney Metro Northwest

REF:https://www.mtr.com.hk/archive/corporate/en/publications/images/business_overview_e.pdf
